{{Infobox character
| name = Hariman
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

''See also: [[Hariman Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Hariman is a sentient, red-and-gold bound book that serves as an advisor to the bearer of a [[Dragon's Fang]]. In his role, he provides guidance, education, and combat assistance to the [[sword]]'s wielder. Hariman possesses a cultured and fussy manner of speaking, often offering commentary on historical events, political instability, or the personal lives of those around him. His knowledge includes significant lore regarding the Dragon's Fangs, the nature of [[Travelers]] and their [[Territories]], and the history of the [[Kings of Damasca]]. He is associated with [[Denner]], who carries him as a companion.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Hariman is a talking book characterized by its distinct red-and-gold [[binding]]. The entity features a gold-painted face on its cover that possesses the ability to come to [[life]]. [[Traveling]] alongside [[Denner]], Hariman serves as the companion and namesake of the traveler's sentient volume.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Hariman]] is a talking book with red-and-gold [[binding]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Hariman]] has a face painted in gold on its cover that can come to [[life]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Hariman]] is a red-and-gold book.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Hariman]] is traveling with [[Denner]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Hariman]] is the name of [[Denner]]’s talking book.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Hariman]] is a huge red-and-gold book that [[Denner]] carries.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Hariman]] is a book that introduces [[Indirial]] to [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Hariman]] is a huge book bound in red-and-gold that serves as [[Denner]]'s advisor.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
